title: CGBSE 12th Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: CGBSE 12th Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: CGBSE 12th Result 2026 on the official website - cgbse.nic.in on 29th April 2026 at 2.30 PM. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the CGBSE 12th Result 2026.

content.text: The Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education (CGBSE) has officially released the CGBSE 12th Result 2026 for the academic session 2025-26 today. Students who appeared for the Class 12 board examinations can now check their results online. CGBSE 12th Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://cgbse.nic.in/ at 2.30 PM.

The board has published results for Class 12 students across all streams including Science, Commerce and Arts today. Students will be able to check and download their marksheet by entering their roll number and other required details on the official result portal once the result link is activated after the official declaration.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result, such as their name, roll number, subject-wise marks, total marks and qualifying status. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the board authorities or their respective schools for correction.

The CGBSE has released the Class 12 Result 2026 on its official website for the current academic session. Students can access their results online using their roll number through the official result portal. The result includes subject-wise theory and practical marks, total marks, grades and overall pass/fail status.

The CGBSE has activated the direct link to check Class 12 Result 2026 on its official result portal. Students can quickly access their results using the direct link provided below and download their provisional online marksheet for reference.
Follow these simple steps to check your CGBSE 12th Result 2026 online:

items: Click on the link “CGBSE 12th Result 2026” or “Higher Secondary Exam Results 2026” available on the homepage.
Enter your Roll Number in the login field
Your CGBSE 12th Result 2026 will appear on the screen with subject-wise marks
Download and take a printout of the online marksheet for future reference
